title: 卡斯拿涉嫌賽後對查爾頓球員種族歧視被停賽8場及罰款6萬鎊

replies.msg:
Leeds United goalkeeper Kiko Casilla banned for eight games over racist comment


The Spaniard - who has always denied the charge - is also fined £60,000 and ordered to attend face-to-face education.


Leeds goalkeeper Kiko Casilla has been given an eight-match ban after he was found to have used racist language towards a Charlton player.





https://news.sky.com/story/leeds-united-goalkeeper-kiko-casilla-banned-for-eight-games-over-racist-comment-11945842
